title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and list models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for Ollama; chat, stream, embed, pull, and manage models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing Ollama LLM, embeddings, and tool-calling components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, file import, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for chatting and generating with Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli (rust)
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax highlighting and history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub Copilot replacements.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for common patterns: PDF RAG, function calling, structured output, Docker setups.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks for CPU/GPU inference with NVIDIA runtime.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir library for Ollama with GenServer-friendly streaming and telemetry.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python template for building RAG pipelines with Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that chats using any Ollama model with slash commands.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package and module for reproducible Ollama deployments on NixOS.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client for Ollama with comptime JSON parsing and streaming support.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for integrating Ollama into mobile and desktop apps.
